channel.title: Нейросети on Crypto Whale Watch
channel.description: Recent content in Нейросети on Crypto Whale Watch

item.title: НЕВЕРОЯТНО! Found a way to cool the DGX — что происходит?
item.description: НЕВЕРОЯТНО! Found a way to cool the DGX — что происходит? Tap water keeps the temperature below 68 degree Celsius at 95% GPU utilization running Qwen3.5-122b-a10B Q6 K precision.

item.title: НЕВЕРОЯТНО! Stop wasting electricity — аналитика
item.description: НЕВЕРОЯТНО! Stop wasting electricity — аналитика Run on my rtx4090 llama-server -m ~/Projects/языковая модель/models/Qwen3.6-27B-UD-Q4_K_XL.

item.title: Let's build claude code from scratch!
item.description: Let's build claude code from scratch! So, Я made this video about how to create claude code from scratch. Here the video: https://youtu.be/8pDfgBEy8bg and Github: https://github.
